columns.name: avdnr
columns.description: Department number where the movement occurs

columns.name: partinr
columns.description: Unique identifier for the batch or part involved in the movement

columns.name: behandlingskodel
columns.description: Code indicating the type of processing involved in the movement

columns.name: slag
columns.description: Type of grain involved in the movement

columns.name: fknr
columns.description: Reference number for related documents or transactions

columns.name: raattKvantum
columns.description: Quantity of grain with rated quality involved in the movement

columns.name: middelTortKvantum
columns.description: Quantity of medium torrefaction involved in the movement

columns.name: tortKvantum
columns.description: Quantity of full torrefaction involved in the movement

columns.name: endringskode
columns.description: Code indicating the nature of the change or modification to the record

columns.name: brukerid
columns.description: User ID of the person performing the movement

columns.name: periode
columns.description: Period or time frame for which the movement is recorded

columns.name: produksenr
columns.description: Unique identifier of the producer involved in the movement

columns.name: sortering
columns.description: Code indicating the sorting or processing steps applied to the grain
